title: utricularia spiralis var. tortilis
intro: Utricularia spiralis var. tortilis, also known as the twisted bladderwort, is a rare and unique carnivorous plant species belonging to the genus Utricularia. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, primarily due to its high concentration of alkaloids such as spiralisine and tortilisine, which have been shown to exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Utricularia spiralis var. tortilis include its potential to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, although more research is necessary to confirm its efficacy. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically harvested and dried for use in tinctures, infusions, and ointments, with caution advised due to its potential toxicity and limited availability.
